test_cases.description: Valid YAML config with all required fields produces a complete 4-file Agent folder
test_cases.input: YAML file containing agent_config with meta (id=TEST-W01-S01, name=Test Analyst, tier=T4, parent=TEST-W01), identity (mission >= 20 words, allowed_scope >= 2, forbidden_scope >= 1), soul (vibe >= 10 words, rules >= 2, motto <= 15 words), operating_rules (steps >= 2, io_contract with input/output/handoff, mandatory_rag, epistemic_lines)
test_cases.expected_output: Directory TEST-W01-S01/ created at dest path containing: INDEX.md (with Meta table showing Agent ID = TEST-W01-S01), IDENTITY.md (with YAML frontmatter), SOUL.md (with Motto block), RULES.md (with I/O Contract section)
test_cases.pass_criteria: All 4 files exist AND each file > 0 bytes AND INDEX.md contains string 'TEST-W01-S01' AND IDENTITY.md starts with '---' AND RULES.md contains '## I/O Contract'

test_cases.description: YAML missing required block 'soul' should be rejected before build
test_cases.input: YAML file containing agent_config with meta, identity, operating_rules but NO soul block
test_cases.expected_output: REJECT with error message: 'Missing block: soul'
test_cases.pass_criteria: build_agent.py returns False or raises ValidationError AND no files are written to disk

test_cases.description: YAML with placeholder mission (TBD) should be rejected
test_cases.expected_output: REJECT with error message citing CQ-02: 'Mission contains placeholder'
test_cases.pass_criteria: Validation rejects before build AND no Agent folder is created

test_cases.description: Minimal valid config (no optional fields) still produces valid Agent
test_cases.input: YAML with all required fields only — no mandatory_rag, no epistemic_lines
test_cases.expected_output: Directory created with 4 files. RULES.md has empty KB Connectivity and Epistemic Coupling sections (graceful degradation)
test_cases.pass_criteria: All 4 files exist AND RULES.md contains '## KB Connectivity' with no crash AND RULES.md contains '## Epistemic Coupling'
